arts.ttl: Josep Guardiola, José Mourinho, Florentino Perez offer their thoughts on Bayern Munich on day of 125th anniversary
arts.sum: On the occasion of the 125th anniversary, I would like to express my admiration and respect to FC Bayern - for your legendary history and your contribution to making football such a valued sport around the world.” “On behalf of Real Madrid, I would like to congratulate FC Bayern on this special anniversary.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz has “slim” chance of facing Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from Kölner Stadt-Anzeiger (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz is in major doubt to face Bayern Munich on Tuesday in the Champions League : Does Bayer Leverkusen have any chance to comeback against Bayern Munich without its best player?

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala unfazed and unbothered by who Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge thinks is Germany’s best
arts.sum: Over the past week, one of the biggest controversies surrounding Bayern Munich has developed around club legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge saying that Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz is the top player in Germany. With Wirtz having an abysmal performance during Bayer Leverkusen’s 3-0 loss to Bayern Munich in the Champions League and Musiala being sensational for the Bavarians, it was only natural that the Bayern Munich star was asked about Rummenigge’s statements after the match.

arts.ttl: “He could go to Bayern Munich, but I can’t see him having the same kind of impact” — former Liverpool defender doubts Mo Salah would be good fit in Bavaria
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be on the hunt for cost efficient ways to boost their attacking group and one player who will be a free agent is Liverpool FC superstar Mo Salah. “It’s not true that Bayern would be prepared to swoop for Mo Salah if his contract is allowed to expire at Liverpool,” Falk told CaughtOffside in his exclusive Fact Files column.

arts.ttl: Harry Extraordinary: How Bayern Munich’s main man perfects his penalty technique
arts.sum: There have been times Kane hasn’t executed well? I just focus on putting the ball down, my steps, my routine, and then, before you know it, it’s just about execution.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich ready Harry Kane succession plan after release clause revelation
arts.sum: Bayern Munich plan to sign a new superstar striker this summer amid doubts over the future of Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany vs. Xabi Alonso tactical battle set for fifth round
arts.sum: “All three games had different stories,” Kompany said ahead of the first leg of Bayern and Leverkusen ’s UEFA Champions League last-16 tie . The previous campaign marked a watershed moment in German football as Leverkusen ended Bayern’s 11-year reign as champions, with Alonso creating a team that was attacking in nature and famous mostly for its never-say-die attitude on their way to becoming the Bundesliga’s first Invincibles .

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz’s season threatened after MRI reveals syndesmosis tear
arts.sum: Germany's preeminent and most reliable footballing publication is currently reporting that Florian Wirtz may be ruled out for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano warns against complacency ahead of UCL second leg against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s 3-0 victory against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League was an utterly glorious one, with the team’s six-game winless streak against Die Werkself snapped and revenge dealt to the team that usurped Bayern last season and won the Bundesliga crown out from under the Bavarians’ noses. Thought the victory was great, it will mean nothing if Bayern do not complete the job in the second leg next week.
